common.title: Title
list.empty: No texts found for this language.
list.empty_archived: No archived texts found. Texts you archive will appear here.
list.stat_total_title: Total number of unique words in this text
list.stat_saved_title: Words you have saved to your vocabulary
edit.heading: Edit Text
edit.exists_warning: Exists - May be partially or fully lost if you change the text!
edit.tags_help: Organize texts with tags for easy filtering.
edit.source_help: Link to the original source of this text.
edit.tips.intro: Here are free sources for reading material in many languages:
edit.tips.gutenberg: Project Gutenberg — 75,000+ free e-books in 60+ languages (plain text, EPUB)
edit.tips.wikisource: Wikisource — Public domain texts in 70+ languages (novels, speeches, historical docs)
edit.tips.nhk: NHK News Web Easy — Simplified Japanese news with furigana
edit.tips.dw: DW Langsam gesprochene Nachrichten — Slow German news with transcripts
edit.tips.rfi: RFI Journal en français facile — Simple French news with transcripts
edit.tips.voa: VOA Learning English — Slow-spoken English news (also has RSS feeds)
edit.tips.opensubtitles: OpenSubtitles — Movie/TV subtitles in 100+ languages (SRT files can be imported directly)
edit.tips.tatoeba: Tatoeba — Community-curated sentences with translations in 400+ languages
edit.tips.simple_wiki: Simple English Wikipedia — Articles in simplified English
edit.tips.rss: RSS feeds — Lukaisu Server can import from newsfeeds directly via Newsfeeds. Most newspapers offer RSS feeds.
edit.tips.epub: EPUB books — Import e-books via Import EPUB
edit.tips.fetch_tip: Tip: Use Import from URL → Web Page above to fetch text directly from any of these sites. Just paste the article URL and click “Fetch Content”.
edit.import_url.youtube_id_label: Or enter YouTube Video ID directly
edit.gutenberg.intro: Browse popular books from Project Gutenberg for your selected language.
edit.gutenberg.no_language: Please select a language above to browse Gutenberg books.
edit.gutenberg.no_results: No Gutenberg books found for this language. Not all languages are available in the Project Gutenberg catalog.
edit.gdl.intro: Browse openly-licensed children's and early-grade readers from the Global Digital Library (includes StoryWeaver). Great for easier texts.
edit.gdl.no_language: Please select a language above to browse Global Digital Library books.
edit.gdl.no_results: No Global Digital Library books found for this language.
edit.feeds.intro: Browse articles from your configured newsfeeds. Set up a new feed if you don't have any yet.
edit.feeds.no_articles: No articles in this feed. Try loading new articles from the Feeds page.

new.url.video_help: YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Bilibili, NicoNico, or PeerTube URL. Captions will be imported if available.
